hooks.command: [ -z "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ] && exit 0; git add -A; files=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); [ -z "$files" ] && exit 0; count=$(echo "$files" | wc -l | tr -d ' '); top=$(echo "$files" | head -3 | paste -sd ', '); if [ "$count" -le 3 ]; then msg="Update $top"; else msg="Update $top and $((count-3)) more files"; fi; git commit -m "$msg" 2>/dev/null || true
